parameters.query:
WITH progress AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS canais_varridos
  FROM controle_varredura_canais_detalhe d
  WHERE d.data_ref = CURRENT_DATE
    AND d.nicho_slug = '{{ $json.nicho_alvo }}'
), candidate_channels AS (
  SELECT
    cd.canal_id,
    cd.nome_canal,
    cd.nicho_alvo,
    cd.score,
    cd.inscritos,
    COALESCE(cd.data_ultima_analise, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01') AS data_ultima_analise,
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM controle_varredura_canais_detalhe d
      WHERE d.data_ref = CURRENT_DATE
        AND d.nicho_slug = '{{ $json.nicho_alvo }}'
        AND d.canal_id = cd.canal_id
    ) AS seen_today
  FROM canais_descobertos cd
  WHERE cd.ativo = true
    AND cd.score >= 0.60
    AND cd.nicho_alvo = '{{ $json.nicho_alvo }}'
), prioritized_channels AS (
  SELECT cc.*
  FROM candidate_channels cc
  WHERE (
    COALESCE((SELECT p.canais_varridos FROM progress p), 0) >= 60
    OR cc.seen_today = false
  )
), source_channels AS (
  SELECT * FROM prioritized_channels
  UNION ALL
  SELECT cc.*
  FROM candidate_channels cc
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM prioritized_channels)
), ranked_channels AS (
  SELECT
    sc.canal_id,
    sc.nome_canal,
    sc.nicho_alvo,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        sc.seen_today ASC,
        sc.score DESC,
        sc.inscritos DESC,
        sc.data_ultima_analise ASC
    ) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_rows
  FROM source_channels sc
), params AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT p.canais_varridos FROM progress p), 0) < 60 THEN 30 ELSE 20 END AS batch_size,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT p.canais_varridos FROM progress p), 0) < 60 THEN 4 ELSE 3 END AS rotation_slots,
    COALESCE(MAX(rc.total_rows), 0) AS total_rows
  FROM ranked_channels rc
), paging AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN total_rows <= batch_size THEN 0
      ELSE LEAST(
        ((FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW()) / 2)::int % rotation_slots) * batch_size),
        GREATEST(total_rows - batch_size, 0)
      )
    END AS start_row,
    batch_size
  FROM params
), selected AS (
  SELECT rc.canal_id, rc.nome_canal, rc.nicho_alvo, rc.rn
  FROM ranked_channels rc
  CROSS JOIN paging p
  WHERE rc.rn > p.start_row
    AND rc.rn <= p.start_row + p.batch_size
  ORDER BY rc.rn
), upsert_detail AS (
  INSERT INTO controle_varredura_canais_detalhe (
    data_ref,
    nicho_slug,
    canal_id,
    first_seen_at,
    last_seen_at
  )
  SELECT
    CURRENT_DATE,
    '{{ $json.nicho_alvo }}',
    s.canal_id,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM selected s
  ON CONFLICT (data_ref, nicho_slug, canal_id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    last_seen_at = EXCLUDED.last_seen_at
  RETURNING canal_id
), ensure_order AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS touched_rows FROM upsert_detail
), upsert_summary AS (
  INSERT INTO controle_varredura_canais_diaria (
    data_ref,
    nicho_slug,
    canais_varridos,
    alvo_minimo_diario,
    ultima_execucao,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    CURRENT_DATE,
    '{{ $json.nicho_alvo }}',
    COALESCE((
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM controle_varredura_canais_detalhe d
      WHERE d.data_ref = CURRENT_DATE
        AND d.nicho_slug = '{{ $json.nicho_alvo }}'
    ), 0),
    60,
    NOW(),
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM ensure_order
  ON CONFLICT (data_ref, nicho_slug)
  DO UPDATE SET
    canais_varridos = EXCLUDED.canais_varridos,
    alvo_minimo_diario = EXCLUDED.alvo_minimo_diario,
    ultima_execucao = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING nicho_slug
)
SELECT s.canal_id, s.nome_canal, s.nicho_alvo
FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS sync_rows FROM upsert_summary) u
LEFT JOIN selected s ON true
WHERE s.canal_id IS NOT NULL;

INSERT INTO videos_pendentes (
  plataforma, canal_id, video_id, url_video,
  titulo_original, duracao_segundos, nicho, status,
  views, likes, comentarios, engagement_pct, thumbnail_url
) VALUES (
  'youtube',
  '{{ $json.canal_id }}',
  '{{ $json.video_id }}',
  '{{ $json.url_video }}',
  '{{ $json.titulo }}',
  {{ $json.duracao_segundos }},
  '{{ $json.nicho }}',
  'pendente',
  {{ $json.views }},
  {{ $json.likes }},
  {{ $json.comentarios }},
  {{ $json.engagement_pct }},
  '{{ $json.thumbnail_url }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (video_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_novos_videos, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'pendente') as pendentes FROM videos_pendentes WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '3 hours';

  ON CONFLICT (data_ref, nicho_slug)
